title: Limit Evaluation Process
description: Systematic approach to evaluating limits of functions
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Define Function f(x) and Limit Point 'a'] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#ffffff B1[Check: Is 'a' in Domain of f(x)?] style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 C1{{"Yes"}} style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 C2{{"No"}} style C2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 D1[Direct Substitution: Evaluate f(a)] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff E1[Result: Limit = f(a)] style E1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff D2[Check: Is f(x) in Indeterminate Form? (e.g., 0/0, ∞/∞)] style D2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 E2{{"Yes"}} style E2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 E3{{"No"}} style E3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 F1[Algebraic Manipulation: Simplify f(x) (e.g., factoring, rationalizing)] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff G1[Check: Does Simplified f(x) Exist at 'a'?] style G1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H1{{"Yes"}} style H1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H2{{"No"}} style H2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 I1[Evaluate Simplified f(x) at 'a'] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff J1[Result: Limit = Simplified f(a)] style J1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff I2[Consider One-Sided Limits (Limit from left and right)] style I2 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff J2[Check: Does Limit from Left = Limit from Right?] style J2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 K1{{"Yes"}} style K1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 K2{{"No"}} style K2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 L1[Result: Limit Exists and = One-Sided Limit Value] style L1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff L2[Result: Limit Does Not Exist] style L2 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff F2[Apply L'Hôpital's Rule (if applicable)] style F2 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff G2[Check: Does L'Hôpital's Rule yield a limit?] style G2 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H3{{"Yes"}} style H3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 H4{{"No"}} style H4 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 I3[Result: Limit = Value after L'Hôpital's Rule] style I3 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff I4[Consider Other Methods (e.g., Squeeze Theorem)] style I4 fill:#51cf66,color:#ffffff J3[Check: Can the limit be determined using other methods?] style J3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 K3{{"Yes"}} style K3 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 K4{{"No"}} style K4 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000000 L3[Result: Limit found using other method] style L3 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff L4[Result: Limit Does Not Exist (or cannot be determined)] style L4 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff M1[End] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#ffffff A1 --> B1 B1 -- Yes --> C1 B1 -- No --> C2 C1 --> D1 D1 --> E1 C2 --> D2 D2 -- Yes --> E2 D2 -- No --> I2 E2 --> F1 F1 --> G1 G1 -- Yes --> H1 G1 -- No --> H2 H1 --> I1 I1 --> J1 H2 --> I2 E3 --> I2 I2 --> J2 J2 -- Yes --> K1 J2 -- No --> K2 K1 --> L1 K2 --> L2 E2 --> F2 F2 --> G2 G2 -- Yes --> H3 G2 -- No --> H4 H3 --> I3 H4 --> I4 I4 --> J3 J3 -- Yes --> K3 J3 -- No --> K4 K3 --> L3 K4 --> L4 E1 --> M1 J1 --> M1 L1 --> M1 L2 --> M1 I3 --> M1 L3 --> M1 L4 --> M1
